prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含物理类）最低位次分别为约1661名→1461名→1166名→1017名→852名，呈持续前移趋势，近5年累计前移约809名，年均前移约162名；2025年基准位次约852名，为历史最高水平，反映出该校在甘肃省理科考生中的吸引力持续增强；该校在甘肃省理科组招生计划2021年52人、2022年57人、2023年55人、2024年55人、2025年55人；2026年招生计划为84人，较2025年大幅扩招29人（+52.7%），扩招幅度显著，理论上会推后录取位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北工业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在21–25名区间（2021年第25→2022年第24→2023年第25→2024年第23→2025年第21→2026年第23），稳居全国顶尖工科院校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（学生被校外人员殴打、校方被指偏袒），但事件影响范围有限；抖音综合热度排名第74位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现明显热度飙升或暴跌信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；拥有航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、管理科学与工程A-等7个A-及以上学科，其中航空宇航、计算机、材料三大王牌学科均为A+，与招生专业高度匹配，对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等西工大核心招生专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均为高热推荐/推荐，社会关注度高；甘肃省2026年高考总人数约218700人，较2025年总人数179817人增加约21.6%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约147700人（较2025年121443人增约21.6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；西北工业大学位于陕西省西安市，与甘肃省相邻，地域接近性较强，对甘肃考生有天然的地理偏好优势；该校在甘肃招生规模较大（2026年理科84人），属于该校在西北地区的重要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强劲势头、2026年招生计划大幅扩招52.7%的推后效应、甘肃省考生总数增加约21.6%的竞争加剧、以及学校顶尖工科实力和优势学科吸引力的多重因素，扩招带来的位次推后效应大于考生增加和学校吸引力提升带来的位次前移效应，但历年持续前移的趋势不可忽视。预测2026年最低位次约1092名，区间928–1256名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（陈士橹飞天班）
- 航空航天类（智慧三航拔尖班）
- 航空航天类（航空/航天方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能等）
- 电子信息类（电子科学与技术、通信工程等）
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化、机器人工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（航宇新材料试验班）
- 航空航天类（航宇智能制造）
- 管理科学与工程类（管理试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间928–1256名内，建议以二档专业（计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类）为主攻方向，一档航空航天类王牌专业可冲刺，三档材料类、管理类作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<928名）可重点冲击一档飞天班/拔尖班；位次接近区间上限（>1256名）应以三档保底为主，争取二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Physics Category) were approximately 1661 → 1461 → 1166 → 1017 → 852, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative advancement of about 809 positions over the past 5 years, averaging about 162 positions per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 852, the highest historical level, reflecting the university's increasing attractiveness among Gansu science examinees; the university's enrollment plan for the Science Group in Gansu was 52 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 55 in 2025; the enrollment plan for 2026 is 84, a significant expansion of 29 students (+52.7%) compared to 2025, which theoretically would push back the admission ranking (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 21–25 range in recent years (2021: 25th → 2022: 24th → 2023: 25th → 2024: 23rd → 2025: 21st → 2026: 23rd), firmly among the top engineering universities in the country, with strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring examinees; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students assaulted by off-campus personnel, the university accused of bias), but the impact of the incidents is limited; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 74th, rated as average, with moderate short video platform exposure and no obvious signals of a surge or sharp drop in popularity; no signs of admission gaps in historical abnormal filing records; it has 7 A- and above disciplines including Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-, among which the three flagship disciplines of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Computer Science, and Materials are all A+, highly matching the enrollment majors and strongly attracting examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at Northwestern Polytechnical University such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended/recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social attention; the total number of examinees in Gansu for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to the 2025 total of 179,817, with an estimated 147,700 Physics Category examinees (an increase of about 21.6% from 121,443 in 2025), intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, adjacent to Gansu Province, with strong geographical proximity, giving it a natural geographical preference advantage for Gansu examinees; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Gansu (84 in the Science category for 2026), making it an important source province for the university in the Northwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong momentum of continuous historical ranking advancement, the push-back effect of a significant 52.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from an approximately 21.6% increase in the total number of Gansu examinees, and the multiple factors of the university's top engineering strength and advantageous discipline appeal, the push-back effect from enrollment expansion outweighs the push-forward effects from increased examinee numbers and enhanced university appeal, but the trend of continuous historical advancement cannot be ignored. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1092, with a range of 928–1256.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Aerospace (Chen Shiliu Feitian Class)
- Aerospace (Smart Three-Aerospace Top Talent Class)
- Aerospace (Aviation/Aerospace Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, etc.)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Materials (Aerospace New Materials Experimental Class)
- Aerospace (Aerospace Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Management Science and Engineering (Management Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 928–1256, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation) as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship Aerospace majors as a reach, and Tier 3 Materials and Management majors as safety options. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<928) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Feitian/Top Talent classes; rankings close to the upper limit (>1256) should prioritize Tier 3 safety options while aiming for Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年文科组（含历史类）最低位次分别为约1933名→987名→1240名，波动较大；2025年基准位次约1240名；该校在甘肃省文科组招生计划2023年3人、2024年3人、2025年3人；2026年招生计划为3人，连续四年持平，计划无变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同理科组，985/211/双一流，软科排名稳定在21–25名区间，学校层次极高；同理科组，2026年偏负面（校园安全事件），但文科招生仅1个专业，影响有限；文科招生专业为外国语言文学类，西工大该学科未进入A-及以上评级，非该校优势领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外国语言文学类在专业热度分析中属于一般观望（2024年外语类），热度中等偏低；甘肃省2026年历史类考生按比例估算约71000人，较2025年58374人增加约21.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；同理科组，陕西与甘肃相邻，地域接近性对文科考生同样适用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划连续四年持平、甘肃省历史类考生增加约21.6%带来的竞争加剧、以及外国语言文学类专业热度一般的因素，在2025年基准1240名基础上预计位次略有后移。预测2026年最低位次约1260名，区间1071–1449名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（唯一专业）
- 外国语言文学类（英语、德语）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 文科组仅外国语言文学类一个招生专业，位次在预测区间1071–1449名内均有录取机会。该专业非西工大优势学科，社会热度一般，建议位次优于区间下限（<1071名）的考生可将其作为稳妥选择，位次接近区间上限（>1449名）需谨慎报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including history category) from 2023 to 2025 were approximately 1933, 987, and 1240 respectively, with significant fluctuations; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1240; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Gansu Province was 3 students in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 3 in 2025; the enrollment plan for 2026 is 3 students, unchanged for four consecutive years, with no changes in the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Same as the science group, 985/211/Double First-Class, with a stable ranking in the 21–25 range on the Soft Science Ranking, indicating a very high university level; same as the science group, there is a slightly negative impact in 2026 (campus safety incident), but the liberal arts enrollment only includes one major, so the impact is limited; the liberal arts enrollment major is Foreign Languages and Literature, which is not rated A- or above at NPU, and is not a strength area of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign Languages and Literature is classified as generally watchful in the major popularity analysis (2024 foreign language category), with medium to low popularity; the estimated number of history category examinees in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 71,000, an increase of approximately 21.6% compared to 58,374 in 2025, with the expansion of the examinee pool intensifying competition; same as the science group, Shaanxi is adjacent to Gansu, and the regional proximity also applies to liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the enrollment plan unchanged for four consecutive years, the intensified competition due to an approximately 21.6% increase in history category examinees in Gansu Province, and the generally average popularity of the Foreign Languages and Literature major, the ranking is expected to slightly shift backward based on the 2025 baseline of 1240. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1260, with a range of 1071–1449.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Only Major)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, German).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The liberal arts group has only one enrollment major, Foreign Languages and Literature, and candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 1071–1449 have admission opportunities. This major is not a strength area of NPU and has average social popularity. It is recommended that candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<1071) consider it as a safe choice, while those with rankings near the upper limit (>1449) should apply cautiously.
